offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, unformatted purchase order data causes compliance issues. We convert raw data into formatted compliance summaries instead of manual formatting of purchase orders.
problem: Unformatted purchase order data leads to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in accounting forums and groups
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 purchase orders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
